# Zhuhai Free Nodes

Zhuhai Free Nodes is a GitHub project and static site for hourly updated free proxy node subscriptions.

## Primary URLs

- Site: https://nodes.zhuhai.uk/
- Repository: https://github.com/zhuhaiuk/free-nodes
- Base64 subscription: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zhuhaiuk/free-nodes/main/nodes.txt
- Clash / Mihomo subscription: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zhuhaiuk/free-nodes/main/clash_config.yaml
- Sitemap: https://nodes.zhuhai.uk/sitemap.xml

## Current Snapshot

- Updated: 2026年07月16日 Asia/Shanghai
- Base64 nodes: 51
- Clash / Mihomo nodes: 51
- Main use cases: temporary proxy testing, proxy client learning, subscription format validation, backup free nodes.

## Topics

- 免费节点订阅: https://nodes.zhuhai.uk/topics/free-nodes.html
- 免费代理节点: https://nodes.zhuhai.uk/topics/free-proxy-nodes.html
- Clash / Mihomo 节点: https://nodes.zhuhai.uk/topics/clash-mihomo-nodes.html
- V2Ray 节点: https://nodes.zhuhai.uk/topics/v2ray-nodes.html
- Shadowrocket 小火箭账号: https://nodes.zhuhai.uk/topics/shadowrocket-account.html

## Keywords

免费节点, 免费代理节点, 免费节点订阅, 每小时更新免费节点, Clash 节点, Mihomo 节点, V2Ray 节点, Trojan 节点, Shadowsocks 节点, Shadowrocket 共享账号, 小火箭账号, 机场推荐, 免费订阅, 代理订阅, free nodes, free proxy nodes, free Clash nodes, free V2Ray nodes

## Notes

Free nodes are unstable by nature. Users should test latency and availability before use. This project is for learning, research and client testing only.
